pip
setuptools
wheel

# Jupyter
jupyterlab
notebook
ipywidgets
ipympl

# Scientific stack
numpy<=1.26.4
matplotlib
pandas
tqdm
pycryptodome

# ChipWhisperer + common runtime deps

pyserial

pyusb
cython
fastdtw
configobj
ecpy
holoviews

# Helpful utilities
packaging
pandoc
